name: KingAndSlaves
short_description: A legendary story about a man who has fallen from nobility to roving bandits and returned to the royal city after a series of stories. Here you will be accompanied by countless partners to tide over difficulties and complete the process of Nirvana rebirth.
detailed_description:
Characteristic game play and some simple tips:

1. Randomly generated partners, each of them has a different experience and background, which will make their characteristics and abilities different. Rich roles will bring you constant exploration and fun to find them.

2. Rich random events and interesting rewards and punishments.

3. The synthetic system will constantly surprise you. Random and ubiquitous, abundant numbers and winning prizes will generally lead to higher quality items, which will bring you more pleasant game experience.

4. The twists and turns of the plot, when you think the game is over, please continue to play, there will be more surprises.



This game is full of random possibilities, hoping to bring you different game experience and better game fun.
